name: AI Financial Market Intelligence & Investment Research Synthesiser

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ $('Split Watchlist into Items').item.json.CompanyName + ' OR ' + $('Split Watchlist into Items').item.json.Ticker }}

parameters.url: =https://r.jina.ai/{{ ($('NewsAPI - Fetch Company News').item.json.articles || [])[0]?.url || 'https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/' + $('Split Watchlist into Items').item.json.Ticker }}

parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022', max_tokens: 1500, temperature: 0.2, system: 'You are a CFA-level investment analyst at a tier-1 fund. You synthesise technical signals, fundamental data, and news sentiment into actionable investment theses. Be contrarian when data warrants it. Be honest about uncertainty. Avoid hype. Use specific numbers. Return only valid JSON. Add a disclaimer that this is not financial advice.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Analyse this equity and generate an investment thesis.

TICKER: ' + $json.ticker + '
COMPANY: ' + $json.companyName + '
SECTOR: ' + $json.sector + '

PRICE DATA:
Current Price: $' + $json.currentPrice + '
Day Change: ' + $json.priceChangePct + '%
52W High: $' + $json.high52 + ' (currently ' + $json.from52WeekHigh + '% from high)
52W Low: $' + $json.low52 + ' (currently ' + $json.from52WeekLow + '% from low)
Analyst Target: $' + $json.analystTarget + ' (' + $json.upsidePotential + '% upside)

FUNDAMENTALS:
P/E Ratio: ' + $json.peRatio + 'x (Forward: ' + $json.forwardPE + 'x)
EPS: $' + $json.eps + '
P/B Ratio: ' + $json.pbRatio + 'x
Dividend Yield: ' + ($json.dividendYield*100).toFixed(2) + '%
Beta: ' + $json.beta + '
Profit Margin: ' + $json.profitMargin + '%
Revenue Growth YoY: ' + $json.revenueGrowthYoY + '%
Earnings Growth YoY: ' + $json.earningsGrowthYoY + '%
Market Cap: $' + $json.marketCap + '

TECHNICAL SIGNAL: ' + $json.technicalSignal + '
VALUATION SIGNAL: ' + $json.valuationSignal + '

RECENT NEWS:
' + $json.headlines.map(h => '• ' + h.title + ' (' + h.source + ')').join('
') + '

ARTICLE CONTENT (top story):
' + $json.articleContent + '

Return ONLY this JSON:
{
  "recommendation": "STRONG BUY|BUY|HOLD|SELL|STRONG SELL",
  "confidenceLevel": "HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW",
  "investmentThesis": "3-4 sentence institutional-quality investment thesis",
  "bullCase": "2-3 sentence bull case with specific price/metric targets",
  "bearCase": "2-3 sentence bear case with specific risk factors",
  "newsSentiment": "VERY POSITIVE|POSITIVE|NEUTRAL|NEGATIVE|VERY NEGATIVE",
  "newsSentimentReason": "1 sentence explanation of news sentiment",
  "keyRisks": ["top 3 risks to watch"],
  "keyTriggers": ["top 3 catalysts that would change thesis"],
  "priceTarget12m": number_or_null,
  "stopLossLevel": number_or_null,
  "oneLineSummary": "max 15 words: the single most important thing to know about this stock today"
}' }] }) }}

nodes.name: OpenAI - Embed Research for Knowledge Base

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vectors: [{ id: $('Parse Investment Analysis').item.json.ticker + '-' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], values: $json.data[0].embedding, metadata: { ticker: $('Parse Investment Analysis').item.json.ticker, companyName: $('Parse Investment Analysis').item.json.companyName, recommendation: $('Parse Investment Analysis').item.json.recommendation, currentPrice: $('Parse Investment Analysis').item.json.currentPrice, priceTarget12m: $('Parse Investment Analysis').item.json.priceTarget12m, sector: $('Parse Investment Analysis').item.json.sector, newsSentiment: $('Parse Investment Analysis').item.json.newsSentiment, analysedAt: $('Parse Investment Analysis').item.json.analysedAt, oneLineSummary: $('Parse Investment Analysis').item.json.oneLineSummary } }], namespace: 'market-research' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022', max_tokens: 2500, temperature: 0.4, system: 'You are the Chief Investment Officer of a boutique research house writing the daily pre-market briefing for high-net-worth clients. Write with authority, precision, and insight. Surface non-obvious connections between holdings. Return only valid JSON.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate today's institutional-quality pre-market briefing from these stock analyses.

' + JSON.stringify($json.data.map(d => ({ ticker: d.ticker, company: d.companyName, sector: d.sector, price: '$' + d.currentPrice, change: d.priceChangePct + '%', recommendation: d.recommendation, thesis: d.investmentThesis, sentiment: d.newsSentiment, summary: d.oneLineSummary, priceTarget: d.priceTarget12m }))) + '

Return ONLY this JSON:
{
  "briefingDate": "' + new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-AU', {weekday:'long', year:'numeric', month:'long', day:'numeric'}) + '",
  "marketOutlook": "RISK-ON|RISK-OFF|MIXED",
  "executiveOverview": "3-4 sentence macro-level synthesis of what the watchlist data is telling us about market conditions",
  "topPick": { "ticker": "...", "reason": "2 sentences why this is today's top conviction call" },
  "avoidToday": { "ticker": "...", "reason": "2 sentences why to avoid or trim today" },
  "themeOfTheDay": "The dominant theme or sector rotation pattern visible across the watchlist",
  "stockSummaries": [{ "ticker": "...", "headline": "1 sentence", "recommendation": "...", "confidence": "..." }],
  "keyRisksToday": ["top 3 macro or market risks to monitor today"],
  "actionItems": ["specific portfolio actions to consider based on today's analysis"],
  "closingNote": "1-2 sentence thoughtful closing note — the one insight investors should carry through the trading day"
}' }] }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '📊 Pre-Market Briefing — ' + $json.briefingDate + ' — Outlook: ' + $json.marketOutlook }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

Daily Investment Briefing

' + $json.briefingDate + '

Market Outlook: ' + $json.marketOutlook + '

' + $json.executiveOverview + '

🏆 Top Pick Today: ' + $json.topPick?.ticker + '

' + $json.topPick?.reason + '

⚠️ Avoid: ' + $json.avoidToday?.ticker + '

' + $json.avoidToday?.reason + '

Theme of the Day

' + $json.themeOfTheDay + '

Key Risks

    ' + ($json.keyRisksToday || []).map(r => '
  • ' + r + '
    • ').join('') + '

Action Items

    ' + ($json.actionItems || []).map(a => '
  • ' + a + '
    • ').join('') + '
' + $json.closingNote + '
Disclaimer: AI-generated briefing for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Consult a licensed financial adviser before making investment decisions.' }}

parameters.text:
={{ $json.outlookEmoji + ' *Pre-Market Briefing — ' + $json.briefingDate + '*
*Market Outlook:* ' + $json.marketOutlook + '

' + $json.executiveOverview + '

:trophy: *Top Pick:* ' + $json.topPick?.ticker + ' — ' + $json.topPick?.reason + '

:warning: *Avoid:* ' + $json.avoidToday?.ticker + ' — ' + $json.avoidToday?.reason + '

:bulb: *Theme:* ' + $json.themeOfTheDay + '

*Stock Snapshot:*
' + ($json.stockSummaries || []).map(s => s.ticker + ': ' + s.recommendation + ' — ' + s.headline).join('
') + '

*Key Risks:*
' + ($json.keyRisksToday || []).map(r => '• ' + r).join('
') + '

_' + $json.closingNote + '_

_' + $json.stockCount + ' stocks analysed • Full report in Google Drive_' }}

main.node: OpenAI - Embed Research for Knowledge Base
